case_title: OSBORNE FUNERAL DIRECTORS vs. RANSOM, LEONARD

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSBORNE FUNERAL DIRECTORS AS TO DEFENDANT RANSOM, LEONARD SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-21-1993
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSBORNE FUNERAL DIRECTORS SERVED NOV-04-1992, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RANSOM, LEONARD
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-21-1993, CONTINUED TO MAY-24-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $169.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSBORNE FUNERAL DIRECTORS AS TO DEFENDANT RANSOM, LEONARD
DECLARATION OF RANDY OSBORNE RE; UNAVAILABILITY OF ORIGINAL CONTRACT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSBORNE FUNERAL DIRECTORS
